name: Import parts from a file using the data import wizard
steps:
Given a user with 'create' permission for the Part permission group is logged in and on the Parts view
Given a valid CSV file containing part data is available
When the user clicks the 'Add Parts' dropdown menu and selects 'Import from File'
Then the data import wizard opens
When the user uploads the CSV file and maps required fields to the corresponding part fields
When the user completes all wizard steps and clicks 'Submit'
Then the imported parts appear in the parts table with correct names and descriptions

name: Import from File wizard blocks submission when required field mapping is missing
steps:
Given a user with 'create' permission for the Part permission group is logged in and on the Parts view
Given a CSV file with a column for part description but no column that can be mapped to 'Part Name' is available
When the user clicks the 'Add Parts' dropdown menu and selects 'Import from File'
When the user uploads the CSV file
When the user attempts to proceed without mapping the required 'Part Name' field
Then the wizard displays an error indicating the required 'Part Name' field mapping is missing and does not advance
